india_trends.title: Infosys CFO Jayesh Sanghrajka says no decision on the timing and quantum of hike — What we know
india_trends.summary: Infosys CFO Jayesh Sanghrajka said the IT major has not made any decision on the timing and quantum of wage hikes. Sanghrajka and CEO Salil Parekh announced the IT major's Q4FY26 financial results today.

india_trends.title: Indian aviation sector to handle about 500 million passengers annually by 2030: NMIA chief
india_trends.summary: India's aviation industry is gearing up for an extraordinary transformation. Experts anticipate a surge to 500 million air travelers by 2030, jumping to an astounding billion by 2047. The surge is spurred by enthusiastic passenger demand and ambitious fleet expansion plans. india_trends.title: Tips Music shares rise 8% to eight-month high after Q4 results; gain 31% in April
india_trends.summary: On April 23, Tips Music's stock climbed 8.02% to ₹660 after a strong Q4FY26 report, showing 32% revenue growth. For FY26, revenue rose 21%, and net profit increased by 30%.&nbsp;

india_trends.title: Premji Invest takes stake in NewEra Hospitals to expand capacity, strengthen advanced care network
india_trends.summary: Premji Invest is backing NewEra Hospitals with a new investment. This funding will help NewEra expand its hospital capacity to 800 beds. The platform will also scale advanced specialty care across Maharashtra. NewEra currently operates three hospitals with 350 beds. The company plans to add three mo

india_trends.title: IEX Q4 results: Cons PAT rises 11% to Rs 130 crore, revenue up 13% on record electricity volumes
india_trends.summary: Indian Energy Exchange delivered steady quarterly growth driven by record electricity trading volumes, improving revenue and profit, alongside strong yearly performance supported by higher supply liquidity and expansion across power, gas and renewable certificate markets

india_trends.title: IEX Q4 Results: Net profit rises 11% YoY to ₹130 crore; board declares ₹2 final dividend
india_trends.summary: Indian Energy Exchange reported a 10.8% YoY increase in net profit to ₹129.8 crore for Q4. Revenue rose 12.5% YoY to ₹196.4 crore. The company achieved record electricity trading volumes and announced a final dividend of ₹2 per share, pending approval.

india_trends.title: Classic Legends to ride on 'SUV of bikes' for growth acceleration: Co-founder, Anupam Thareja
india_trends.summary: Classic Legends is focusing on the scrambler bike segment to boost growth. The company has launched new Yezdi and BSA scrambler models. india_trends.summary: Fuel and LPG supplies in Karnataka remain stable. Indian Oil Corporation assures no petrol or diesel shortages. Domestic LPG deliveries are improving after a March 2026 surge. india_trends.title: Infosys Q4 results 2026: Headcount falls by 8,400 even as operating profits jump 13.6% YoY
india_trends.summary: The IT giant’s last twelve-month (LTM) attrition rate has increased from 12.3% in Q3 to 12.6% in Q4 of FY26.

india_trends.title: Premji Invest backs Maharashtra-based hospital chain NewEra Hospitals
india_trends.summary: Premji Invest has funded NewEra Hospitals to expand its Maharashtra footprint from 350 to 800 beds. The capital will help launch three new facilities in Nagpur to bridge regional quaternary healthcare gaps.

india_trends.title: Yezdi, BSA debut twin scramblers to chase India’s premium bike boom: Check prices, key features & more
india_trends.summary: Yezdi and BSA have launched two new scrambler motorcycles in India. The Yezdi Scrambler 350 and BSA Scrambler 650 aim to capture the growing premium scrambler market.
